The journal

Local guides, the kitchen, the coast — little stories from our corner of Cape Town, written by the people who live it.

The city

Our quiet plan to keep the city greener

What a greener stay actually means

RRoyal Hotel

A contemporary grand hotel in the heart of Cape Town. City-view rooms and suites, a rooftop pool and spa, and a calmer way to stay in the city.
